2604.27947.title: Attractor FCM
2604.27947.paper_summary: In this paper an attractor FCM is created, tested, and analyzed. This FCM is neither a hebbian based nor agentic, nor a hybrid; it rather is a gradient descent based, physics constrained, Jacobian version of an FCM. Moreover, this model has several quirks; it uses residual memory, back propagation through time, and a fixed point anchor that is recursively implemented to update its weights. The residuals update the recursive part without losing the system memory. The model's anchor enables it to converge in a fixed point for which back propagation through time unrolls it and ensures that the error minimization is for an accurate gradient. Furthermore, a new learning algorithm is utilized. The Newton's method finds the system's fixed point attractor and then gradient descend is adaptively changing the landscape; an adaptive term is used to directly manipulate the weights through the attractor dynamics. As the adaptive term changes, the descent through the landscape is constantly adjusting according to sigmoid saturation, and that prevents premature convergence to a local minimum. Lastly, the updates are filtered by causal mask that informs the network about the physics, respecting the initial expert based opinions, for which model reduces the error to the target in an efficient way.
2604.27947.paper_summary_zh: 在本文中，創建、測試和分析了一個吸引子FCM。這個FCM既不是基於Hebbian的，也不是代理的，亦不是混合的；它實際上是一個基於梯度下降的、受物理約束的、雅可比版本的FCM。此外，這個模型有幾個特點；它使用殘餘記憶、時間反向傳播，以及一個固定點錨點，該錨點被遞歸實現以更新其權重。殘差在不失去系統記憶的情況下更新遞歸部分。模型的錨點使其能夠在一個固定點上收斂，通過時間的反向傳播展開它，並確保誤差最小化是針對準確的梯度。此外，使用了一種新的學習算法。牛頓法找到系統的固定點吸引子，然後梯度下降自適應地改變景觀；一個自適應項被用來通過吸引子動力學直接操控權重。隨著自適應項的變化，通過景觀的下降不斷根據sigmoid飽和進行調整，這防止了過早收斂到局部最小值。最後，更新通過因果掩碼進行過濾，該掩碼告知網絡有關物理的資訊，尊重最初基於專家的意見，從而使模型以高效的方式將誤差減少到目標。
2604.27947.author: Alexis Kafantaris et.al.
